# Humanos

> Authorization infrastructure for the agentic economy. Humanos turns approvals, permissions and policies into portable runtime authorization that AI agents and external systems can verify before execution — with independently verifiable execution receipts afterwards.

Humanos works alongside existing IAM, RBAC, OAuth, approval workflows and policy systems, making authorization portable and externally verifiable across organizations and autonomous workflows.

## Core pages
- [Platform](https://humanos.tech/platform): Portable authorization infrastructure — runtime verification, recovery, receipts, cross-system authorization, policy and identity.
- [Use cases](https://humanos.tech/use-cases): What becomes possible when human authorization becomes machine-verifiable.
- [Pricing](https://humanos.tech/pricing): Pay for verified execution — not seats, users, agents, or stored data.
- [Trust](https://humanos.tech/trust): Independently verifiable proof and open standards.
- [Customer stories](https://humanos.tech/case-studies): Systems running Humanos in their execution path.
- [Company](https://humanos.tech/company): Building the authorization layer for autonomous systems.

## Case studies
- [Humanos × Numo](https://humanos.tech/case-studies/numo): Verifying every agent-driven financial action before execution.
- [Humanos × Ralio](https://humanos.tech/case-studies/ralio): Verifiable agent payments beyond closed banking APIs.
- [Humanos × Lusíadas](https://humanos.tech/case-studies/lusiadas): One approval API across every clinical system.
- [Humanos × Paymove](https://humanos.tech/case-studies/paymove): Settling verifiably authorized agent payments on the Visa rail.
- [Humanos × DataWhisper](https://humanos.tech/case-studies/datawhisper): Verifying every high-risk AI action inside regulated workflows.
